summary: Admin Console Bug Fixes Testing (FIX 1 & FIX 2) - BOTH FIXES VERIFIED WORKING. FIX 1: Modal 'Nuova Giornata' inline number picker expands/collapses correctly within same modal, auto-fills Label field. FIX 2: Back button navigates from Admin Console to Profile successfully.

FIX_1_INLINE_NUMBER_PICKER.description: Modal 'Nuova Giornata' - Inline expandable list for number selection (not nested Modal)
test_steps: 2. Navigate to Profile tab > ADMIN CONSOLE
5. Inline list expands showing 'Giornata X' options
7. Field updates, Label auto-fills, list collapses
evidence: Screenshot 14 shows inline list expanded with Giornata 3, 4, 5, 7, 11... items
Screenshot 15 shows after selection: Numero='Giornata 3', Label='Giornata 3' auto-filled, list collapsed
Chevron icon toggles from down to up when expanded
Numbers 1, 2, 6, 8, 9, 10 NOT shown (already created in current season)

FIX_2_BACK_BUTTON.description: Back button in Admin Console navigates to Profile using router.canGoBack() with fallback
evidence: Screenshot 06 shows Admin Console with back arrow visible
Screenshot 07 shows Profile page after clicking back arrow
Successfully navigated from Admin Console to Profile page

FIX_1_NUMBER_FILTERING.description: Numbers already created in current season are filtered out from dropdown
evidence: getAvailableNumbers() function at line 107-110 filters used numbers

FIX_1_AUTO_FILL_LABEL.description: After selecting number, Label field is auto-filled with 'Giornata X'

critical_code_review_comments: ✓ FIX 1: Inline number picker implemented correctly - no nested Modal, uses View with inlinePickerList style
✓ FIX 1: Number picker expands/collapses inline below 'Seleziona numero...' field
✓ FIX 1: Available numbers correctly filtered (1-40 minus already used)
✓ FIX 1: Label field auto-fills when number is selected
✓ FIX 1: ScrollView wrapper allows scrolling when inline list expands
✓ FIX 2: Back button uses router.canGoBack() with fallback to router.replace('/(tabs)/profile')
✓ FIX 2: hitSlop={{ top: 12, bottom: 12, left: 12, right: 12 }} applied for better tap area
context_for_next_testing_agent: Both Admin Console bug fixes (FIX 1: inline number picker, FIX 2: back button) verified working. The inline number picker shows available matchday numbers (1-40 minus already created) in an expandable list within the same modal. The back button successfully navigates from Admin Console to Profile page.
screenshots: .screenshots/14_inline_list_test.png - Inline number list expanded with Giornata options
.screenshots/15_after_selection.png - After selecting Giornata 3, Label auto-filled, list collapsed
.screenshots/06_admin_before_back.png - Admin Console with back arrow visible
.screenshots/07_after_back.png - Profile page after clicking back arrow
